messages.content:
reformulta in a good English "Thank you for your email. I’ll share it with our IT department and will let you know if we have any feedback.

As promised, please find attached the number of added patients and the users list for the Italian database. 

Have a nice day. "

Thank you for your email. I will forward it to our IT department and inform you if we have any feedback. As per our agreement, please find attached the list of added patients and users for the Italian database. Have a great day.

Reformulate in a good English "This is good news if you succeed to access the Italian questionnaire with your phone on 4G.

It’s strange and I’m afraid that this can be due to some restrictions from your system, maybe I’m wrong too. 

I checked the config of the servers and the English and the Italian questionnaire are maintained on the same server in Ireland, Dublin precisely.

The servers' location is the same ID and if I look at the details all the servers' location, this ID belongs to Ireland as you can see below: 

Perhaps you can share this information with your IT department to see if they can investigate more about this issue and let us know. 

"

It's great news if you are able to access the Italian questionnaire on your phone with 4G. I find it strange that there may be some restrictions from your system causing this issue, although I could be mistaken. After checking the server configuration, I have confirmed that both the English and Italian questionnaires are maintained on the same server in Dublin, Ireland. In fact, all servers have the same ID and belong to Ireland, as shown in the details below. I suggest sharing this information with your IT department to investigate the issue further and offer us feedback.
reformulate in a good english "The servers’ location is the same ID and if I look at the details all the servers’ location, this ID belongs to Ireland as you can see below"
All servers have the same ID and upon reviewing their location details, it appears that they are all situated in Ireland, as demonstrated below.

Reformulate in a good english "It’s great news if you can access the Italian questionnaire on your phone with 4G. I find it strange that there may be some restrictions from your system causing this issue, although I could be mistaken. After checking the server configuration, I have confirmed that both the English and Italian questionnaires are maintained on the same server in Dublin, Ireland. Both servers (English + Italian) have the same ID and upon reviewing their location details, it appears that this ID is for Ireland, as demonstrated below.
I suggest sharing this information with your IT department to see if they can investigate more the issue and offer us feedback."

That's excellent news if you're able to access the Italian questionnaire on your phone using 4G. However, it's concerning that there may be some restrictions from your system that are causing this issue, although I'm not entirely certain. Nevertheless, I have investigated the issue further by checking the server configuration. I can confirm that both the English and Italian questionnaires are stored on the same server, located in Dublin, Ireland. Interestingly, both servers have the same ID and upon reviewing their location details, it appears that this ID corresponds to Ireland, as provided below. I highly recommend sharing this information with your IT department so that they can investigate the issue further and provide us with feedback.

reformulate in a good english "Could you check this discrepancy for subject GE-07-006? 

The SC put that no lesion was treated but a device was unpackaged and the procedure was successful as you can see below:"

Would it be possible for you to investigate the disparity regarding subject GE-07-006? According to the source material, the SC reported that no lesions were treated despite unpackaging a device and the procedure being successful, as indicated below:

reformulate in a good english "There are also some other patients for whom data is not consistent (please, see attachment).

For instance, 

Patient GR-01-001 had more than 450 ml of contrast media and the device evaluation questions were all answered to 5. I assume that the user confounded the evaluation rules because the procedure was successful and the procedure duration reasonable. 

Patient GR-02-001 had a vessel diameter of 25 (mm ???). All of the other vessel diameters with the same access were within 2 and 3.5 mm. Maybe sites didn't take into account the diameter unit. Perhaps a double-check will be helpful. 

Patient SG-04-001 procedure duration was 98 min that's huge compared to all the duration. A double-check could be helpful too. 

"

Additionally, there are several other patients within the dataset whose data appears to be inconsistent (please refer to the attached document). For example, Patient GR-01-001 had more than 450 ml of contrast media used during the procedure, and all of the device evaluation questions were answered with a rating of 5. I suspect that the user may have misunderstood the evaluation rules and mistakenly given the procedure a high rating due to its successful outcome and reasonable duration. 

Patient GR-02-001 had a vessel diameter measurement of 25 (mm???), while all of the other vessel diameters with the same access point were reported to be within 2 and 3.5 mm. It is possible that the unit of diameter was not reported consistently across different sites, so a double-check could be beneficial. 

In addition, Patient SG-04-001 had a significantly longer procedure duration of 98 minutes, in contrast to the typical duration for these procedures. It might be helpful to conduct a double-check to verify this abnormal duration.

reformulate"The sponsor of study 33784 forgot his password and he needs to have access to the study as soon as possible. 

Attached, you can find his request. 

Could you help, please?

Would it be possible in the future, to manage this kind of issue myself for example by sending to the user a link to reset his password?"

The sponsor for study 33784 has forgotten his password and requires immediate access to the study. His request has been attached for your reference. Can you please assist?

Furthermore, is it possible to have a feature in place for users to reset their own passwords? This would enable me to handle such issues in the future by sending a link to the user to reset their password.

reformulate "Unfortunately, password recovery is handled by the support. 

I dropped an email to them and they will certainly contact you and help you to reset your password.  

Please, let me know by noon if the request was treated or not in order to push them."

Regrettably, password recovery is currently managed exclusively by our support team. I have taken the liberty of sending them an email with your request and they will promptly reach out to you to assist with resetting your password. 

Please notify me before noon if you have not received any response from the support team, and I will escalate the issue on your behalf.

reformulate "Yes, I know it's IBM, the have some restrictions for security reason which is good. 

Ok, thank you. 
"
I'm aware that IBM has certain security restrictions in place, which is a positive safeguard against potential threats. Thank you for letting me know.

reformulate "Thank you for your email. 

Please, find attached my CV and diploma. 

I sent you also one reference letter I got from my main teahcer a while ago.

I attached also one email for recommendation of one of our clients. "

Thank you for reaching out to me via email. 

I have received your CV and diploma, thank you for sending them across. Additionally, I have received a reference letter from your main teacher that you provided earlier. 

Furthermore, I noticed that you have attached an email for recommendation from one of your clients. Thank you for sharing that with me as well.

reformulate in a good english "Thank you for your email. 

Please, find attached my CV and diploma. 

I sent you also one reference letter I got from my main teacher a while ago.

I attached also one email for a recommendation of one of our clients. "

Thank you for your email. 

Attached, you will find my CV and diploma for your review. In addition, I also forwarded a reference letter from my previous main teacher. Finally, I have included an email from one of our clients offering a recommendation.
